hero.title: Nasun
hero.subtitle: The Future of Entertainment
hero.description: Nasun is a community-driven, financially sustainable ecosystem, managing IPs for global mass consumption. Together we will not only produce powerful experiences in traditional mediums such as blockbuster films and AAA games but also pioneer the future of entertainment in both the digital and real worlds.

grants.title: AWARDS & GRANTS
grants.description: Nasun has won over 10 Awards and Grants through pitch competitions focused on gaming, content and business judged by relevant industry CEOs, leaders and experts selected and approved by the South Korean government.
grants.more: To learn more in detail about our process to applying, pitching and winning Grants,

awardsGrants.title: AWARDS & GRANTS
awardsGrants.subtitle: WINNER PITCH COMPETITIONS 10X
awardsGrants.footer: Each competition was sponsored by the South Korean government and evaluated by industry leaders and experts in entertainment, gaming, finance, Web3, and emerging technologies.

newsEvents.title: NEWS & EVENTS
newsEvents.subtitle: LATEST UPDATES FROM NASUN
newsEvents.footer: Stay updated with the latest news, announcements, and events from the Nasun community.

joinUs.title: JOIN US AND GET INVOLVED
joinUs.description: Nasun will provide a place where people from all parts of the world and different backgrounds can come together to share their passion for art, storytelling, technology, and business, and in so doing, the community will become the main creative and financial driver of the studio. By leveraging the latest tech in Web3, AI, and social media, we will together, by managing IPs, grow a flourishing, complementary creative and financial environment to produce best in class products and services.

foundersSale.title: GENESIS SALE
foundersSale.subtitle: Black Series Genesis Mint
foundersSale.description1: Be one of the first to join Nasun and we will become the most productive and prosperous community focused on mass, real world adoption, creating fun, exciting things that make people happy.
foundersSale.description2: To promote active participation of early Nasun adopters, the Genesis Sale will receive a significant portion of the total token supply.

managingIps.title: MANAGING IPs
managingIps.description: We will use the available technology to manage a portfolio of IPs through ideation, development, preproduction, production, post, marketing and distribution. We will ensure only the highest quality, best in class products and services hit the markets for the general public to consume, use and enjoy. Our mission is to not hype ecosystem projects for those already in our community but to compete and dominate in the open markets.
managingIps.more: Learn more about the first financial and creative IPs we will manage together as a community and discover the real “Killer App.” (hint: it's not AI or code).

latestNews.title: LATEST NEWS & ACTIVITIES
latestNews.description: Check out Nasun’s latest announcements, news and posts:

joinFuture.heading: Join the Future of Entertainment and Finance
joinFuture.paragraph1Body: that manages and scales intellectual properties (IPs) for global audiences.
joinFuture.paragraph2: Our mission is to bring storytelling, finance, and technology together to reimagine how immersive experiences—from films and games to emerging digital and physical worlds—are brought to life and shared.
joinFuture.paragraph3: Although there are other projects with similar aspirations, what sets us apart is our focus on story. This is the soul of Nasun, and it will create a halo effect imparting everything in its glow with more value. Loyalty and devotion to a beloved source material form the most passionate communities.
joinFuture.paragraph4: Join us as we unlock our collective potential and shape a future beyond imagination.

vision.title: VISION
vision.subtitle: On / Off-Chain Consensus
vision.description: Nasun community manages and scales intellectual properties (IPs) for global audiences. Our mission is to bring storytelling, finance, and technology together to reimagine how immersive experiences—from films and games to emerging digital and physical worlds—are brought to life and shared.

nasunIs.title: Nasun is
nasunIs.description: a Community-Driven Ecosystem that manages and scales intellectual properties (IPs) for global audiences. Our mission is to bring storytelling, finance, and technology together to reimagine how immersive experiences—from films and games to emerging digital and physical worlds—are brought to life and shared.

whatSetsUsApart.title: What sets us apart is
whatSetsUsApart.description: our focus on story. This is the soul of Nasun, and it will create a halo effect imparting everything in its glow with more value. Loyalty and devotion to a beloved source material form the most passionate communities.

joinUsAsWe.title: Join us as we
joinUsAsWe.description: unlock our collective potential and shape a future beyond imagination.

communityDriven.title: Nasun is a community-driven project
communityDriven.description: , supported by its members, grants, and pitch competitions. We are not seeking venture capital funding during this startup phase to stay true to our ethos of putting the community first.

coreVoice.title: You are the core voice
coreVoice.description: and consensus of Nasun. Before engaging, we encourage you to explore our vision for the future of entertainment, finance, and technology on our website—and see if our values align.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Climb the Ranks Early and meaningful contribution is recognized. Top contributors share in the launch reward pool and a chance to receive a Genesis NFT.

leader.title: If you're a leader
leader.description: or active participant in a relevant community or industry, we invite you to join us as an Wave 1 Contributor.

battalionNft.title: Battalion NFT (Free Mint)
battalionNft.description: The Gateway Pass Mint your free pass to unlock Genesis NFT multipliers, eligibility for exclusive giveaways, and early testing access.

earlyContributor.title: Early Contributors
earlyContributor.description: Lasting Status Lead in Wave 1 to earn a rare Brigadier NFT with exclusive utilities and long-term recognition.

nftSale.title: GENESIS NFT
nftSale.subtitle: EMBODY OUR VISION AND COMMITMENT
nftSale.description1: Each piece was inspired by the sci-fi world-building of our first IP—Gen Sol, and was crafted using tools like Blender, ZBrush, Substance Painter, and Photoshop.
nftSale.description2: Owning one means joining us beyond the boundaries of art, finance, and technology—where our imagination fuels our journey into a future without limits.
